name: QA 1493
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1493

pcp-atopsar with multiple archives in a directory

- reproducer for https://github.com/performancecopilot/pcp/issues/1911



valgrind variant, see qa/1492 for the non-valgrind variant



check-group-include: pcp atopsar



Copyright (c) 2024 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py centos-stream8-container reproduce
